creator: yuri@tsoft.com
text:
I use embedded in P6T motherboard Intel 82801JI sound card chipset.
mixer(8) and aumix don't even show that pcm can have 'rec' flag. As a result it is impossible to record anything (like Skype conversation) by the third-party app.

Here are relevant lines from dmesg:
hdac0: <Intel 82801JI High Definition Audio Controller> mem 0xf7ff8000-0xf7ffbfff irq 22 at device 27.0 on pci0
hdac0: HDA Driver Revision: 20100226_0142
hdac0: [ITHREAD]
hdac0: HDA Codec #0: Realtek ALC888
pcm0: <HDA Realtek ALC888 PCM #0 Analog> at cad 0 nid 1 on hdac0
pcm1: <HDA Realtek ALC888 PCM #1 Analog> at cad 0 nid 1 on hdac0
pcm2: <HDA Realtek ALC888 PCM #2 Digital> at cad 0 nid 1 on hdac0
pcm3: <HDA Realtek ALC888 PCM #3 Digital> at cad 0 nid 1 on hdac0
